'''Von Totha''' was a [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]]. More competent than [[Yabosta Dark Jedi apprentice|another apprentice]] in the group, Totha was sent to [[Skalokor]] with some [[Droid/Legends|droids]] and [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] mercenaries to eliminate the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Niquon]].<ref name="Jedi's Legacy" />
